title: Simple Mace
description: Looking for a more minimalist mace style? You’ve come to the right place.
body:
**Tired of overcomplicated mace designs?**

This resource pack gives the mace a **simpler**, **cleaner**, and more **minimalist** look while keeping a **vanilla-friendly style**.

Designed for players who want:

> - A **clean** and **readable** mace model
> - **Minimalist** design that fits vanilla Minecraft
> - No **visual** overload, just **straight** to the point

This pack is **purely visual** and only changes the mace’s appearance.
**Compatible** with vanilla and most modpacks.


**What’s next?**

Refining and upgrading the mace’s design like ~~Christmas~~ (Already made), Halloween, and seasonal-themed variants.

## SEE MY OTHER PROJECTS HERE
> - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-mace-christmas-edition
> - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-mace-winter-edition
> - https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/simple-mace-autumn-edition (will come soon!)


### Lightweight. Simple. Vanilla-friendly.
